title: Remediate duplicate open rows and enforce unique open-slug index in live DB
objective: Perform narrow live-DB remediation only: pause/stop remaining entry writer safely, back up the live DB, close/void duplicate open rows under the approved rule, create the missing unique open-slug index, and verify post-remediation truth alignment. No production code changes.
rules: pause remaining entry writer before any DB write
backup live DB before any remediation
if backup fails, stop and return BLOCKED
keep earliest open row for each duplicate slug
close/void extra duplicate open rows using approved remediation values
preserve source, row ids, ts_open, and original entry fields
create unique index only after duplicate open rows are remediated
verify single stack remains intact and no new duplicates appear in verification window
